long_description:
NRE were alerted of link errors incrementing between bcs117a.sr07.wdc04 Port-Channel999 <-> bas11b.sr07.wdc04 Port-Channel5. Raising this INC to track progress.


https://github.ibm.com/IaaS-NRE/nreincidents/issues/19686
close_notes: Link shut to mitigate any further impact. Will proceed to do Layer1 troubleshooting to resolve any issues with the link before adding it back to service. (Note: This incident was resolved via one-touch automation.)
